essence: Designs and advances core machine‑learning algorithms and architectures to push the boundaries of AI capability.

identity.title: AI Research Scientist
identity.summary: Conducts original research in machine learning, publishes papers, prototypes novel models, and translates research into production prototypes.

salary.notes: Senior research scientists at leading labs or in specialised domains (e.g., robotics, safety) can earn significantly more.

qualifications: PhD or strong research record in machine learning, AI, or related field
Experience publishing in top conferences and building research prototypes
Ability to design experiments and evaluate models rigorously

lifestyle.description: Work alternates between deep research, reading literature, coding experiments, and collaborating with engineers to productise models. Often based in labs, universities, or R&D teams.

habits: Designs and runs experiments to test hypotheses
Prototypes models and shares results with peers
